English: Meet with the Mayor of Saint City
Simplified_Chinese: 与晨光市长会面

English: The Truth of the Expedition
Simplified_Chinese: 远征的真相

English: Ah, I see. Did the Strange Collector send you?
Simplified_Chinese: 啊，我明白了。是那个诡异的收藏家派你来的吗？

English: I have nothing to tell you about that. Just go back.
Simplified_Chinese: 关于那件事，我无可奉告。你回去吧。

English: Hmm? If not, then why did you come to me?
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯？如果不是，那你来找我做什么？

English: Even for you, I have nothing more to say.
Simplified_Chinese: 就算是你，我也没什么好说的了。

English: Hmm? Do I know anything about the mayor?
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯？我知道关于市长的什么事吗？

English: Meet with Helgar
Simplified_Chinese: 与海格乐会面

English: Trapped in the Maze
Simplified_Chinese: 迷宫困局

English: Well… I don’t know much, but lately the mayor of Flaris has been visiting his house quite often. Why don’t you try talking to Flarine?
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯……我知道的也不多，不过最近帕里市长倒是经常去他那儿拜访。您不妨去问问他？

English: You know the way, right?
Simplified_Chinese: 您认得路的，对吧？

English: You’re the one asking, and yet… If it’s nothing important, could you step aside?
Simplified_Chinese: 明明是您向我打听，可您这话说的……如果没什么要紧事，能请您让一让吗？

English: That’s all I know. Go see Flarine.
Simplified_Chinese: 我知道的就这些了。去见见帕里市长吧。

English: Hmm? It’s been a while. What brings you here?
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯？好久不见。什么风把您吹来了？

English: Meet with the Mayor of Flarine
Simplified_Chinese: 与帕里市长会面

English: Friend’s Testimony
Simplified_Chinese: 友人的证词

English: Actually… something like this was found in western Flaris.
Simplified_Chinese: 其实……帕里西部发现了类似这样的东西。

English: Look at this Saint City logo. I thought I should let him know, so I brought it to him.
Simplified_Chinese: 您看这个晨光标志。我觉得应该让他知道这件事，就把它带来了。

English: But more pieces like this keep turning up, so I’ve been visiting him often.
Simplified_Chinese: 但类似的东西还在不断出现，所以我最近才经常来这儿拜访他。

English: He was shocked when he saw it, took it away, and told me not to speak of it to anyone. Do you want this?
Simplified_Chinese: 他看到这东西时很震惊，把它拿走了，还让我别告诉任何人。你想要这个吗？

English: As far as I know, these pieces came from the central region of the Leren Mountains. Fortunately for him, powerful masquerpets wander the area, keeping people away and stopping any rumors from spreading. But that shouldn’t be a problem for you.
Simplified_Chinese: 据我所知，这些碎片来自乐雅山脉的中心地带。对他来说幸运的是，那片区域有强大的怪物出没，吓退了人群，也阻止了任何谣言扩散。但这对你来说应该不成问题。

English: Hmm? You don’t need it? Well, I can’t give you this piece, but if you need another one, feel free to ask.
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯？你不需要吗？好吧，这个碎片我不能给你，但如果你需要别的，随时可以来找我。

English: I’ve already told you where it is, haven’t I? Someone like you shouldn’t have any trouble handling the monsters there and finding what you need.
Simplified_Chinese: 我已经告诉过你它在哪儿了，对吧？像你这样的人，对付那里的怪物、找到需要的东西应该不成问题。

English: Wait… this is…! How did you get this?
Simplified_Chinese: 等等……这是……！你是怎么拿到它的？

English: Find “Fragment of ???”
Simplified_Chinese: 寻找“？？？的碎片”

English: His True Intention
Simplified_Chinese: 他的真实意图

English: Now that you’ve come this far, I have no choice but to tell you everything. Are you ready? That fragment is from the ship the expedition used when they set sail.
Simplified_Chinese: 既然你已经走到这一步，我也只能把一切都告诉你了。你准备好了吗？那片碎片来自探险队启航时所乘的船。

English: How do I know that from a single piece of debris? Because I was involved in everything—from its design to its construction. But so far, all we’ve found are scattered fragments like this.
Simplified_Chinese: 我怎么能从一片残骸就判断出来？因为从它的设计到建造，我全程都参与了。但到目前为止，我们找到的只是像这样散落的碎片。

English: I’ve done my best to stop the news from spreading, but there’s only so much I can do. At this point, I have no one left to turn to but you. Could you help find more clues about the expedition?
Simplified_Chinese: 我已经尽力阻止消息扩散，但能做的也只有这么多。事到如今，除了你，我也没有可以指望的人了。你能帮忙寻找更多关于探险队的线索吗？

English: Thank you. The expedition followed the Darkon 1 mountain range. Start searching from there.
Simplified_Chinese: 谢谢你。探险队当时是沿着达肯1的山脉行进的。就从那里开始搜索吧。

English: So even my last hope is fading. If you change your mind, please come back.
Simplified_Chinese: 看来我最后的希望也要破灭了。如果你改变了主意，请一定回来找我。

English: Have you found anything? Oh… this is getting serious.
Simplified_Chinese: 你找到什么线索了吗？哦……这下事态严重了。

English: Welcome, adventurer. Hmm? What is this?
Simplified_Chinese: 欢迎，冒险者。嗯？这是什么东西？

English: Bring “Fragment of a Fallen Ship” to the Darken Mayor
Simplified_Chinese: 将“沉船碎片”带给达肯市长

English: Seeking the Witness… 1
Simplified_Chinese: 寻找证人… 1

English: Well… I don’t know anything about this shipwreck, but there is someone who might.
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯……关于这艘沉船，我确实一无所知，但有个人或许能帮上忙。

English: A High-Dwarpet named Liekyen might know something. You should go see him.
Simplified_Chinese: 一个名叫利绮安的高阶矮人可能会知道些什么。你该去见见他。

English: Of course, you can search elsewhere first if you prefer.
Simplified_Chinese: 当然，如果你愿意，也可以从其他地方先找起。

English: You haven’t gone yet? That’s really all I can think of.
Simplified_Chinese: 你还没出发吗？我真的只能想到这些了。

English: A shipwreck? Ah… you mean that one.
Simplified_Chinese: 沉船？啊……你是指那艘船啊。

English: Meet with Liekyen
Simplified_Chinese: 与利绮安会面

English: Seeking the Witness… 2
Simplified_Chinese: 寻找证人… 2

English: It was deep in the mountains. I saw a shadow and thought it was a monster… but it turned out to be a ship falling from the sky.
Simplified_Chinese: 它坠落在山脉深处。我当时看见一个黑影，还以为是怪物……没想到是一艘从天而降的船。

English: There was no one on board, even when I searched it the first time. Not a single body. I checked around to see if there was anything useful, but all I found was a book full of strange codes. Curious what it says?
Simplified_Chinese: 船上一个人也没有，我最初搜查时就是空船。一具遗体都没找到。我在附近检查过，想看看有没有可用的东西，结果只找到一本写满古怪代码的书。想知道上面写了什么吗？

English: I couldn’t make heads or tails of it, so I handed it over to Inisis. If you’re interested, go talk to her.
Simplified_Chinese: 我完全看不懂那些内容，就把它交给[导师] 伊内瑟丝了。如果你感兴趣，就去找她聊聊吧。

English: Not curious? Well, that’s your choice.
Simplified_Chinese: 不感兴趣吗？好吧，这是你的选择。

English: Inisis knows the details. If she finishes deciphering it, could you come back and tell me what she found?
Simplified_Chinese: 详细情况伊内瑟丝清楚。如果她完成了解读，你能回来告诉我发现了什么吗？

English: Ah, you’ve come for the logbook?
Simplified_Chinese: 啊，你是为那本航行日志来的？

English: Meet with Inisis
Simplified_Chinese: 与伊内瑟丝会面

English: Searching for Clues… 1
Simplified_Chinese: 搜寻线索… 1

English: It turned out to be just a simple sailing logbook. There’s nothing special written in it. Are you still looking for more clues?
Simplified_Chinese: 结果那只是一本普通的航行日志，上面没写什么特别的内容。你还在寻找更多线索吗？

English: Actually, after reading it, Amadolka decided to search the Darken mountains again to see if anything else turns up. You should meet him before heading back to Saint City.
Simplified_Chinese: 其实，读完日志后，艾玛都卡决定再搜查一次达肯山脉，看看还有没有其他发现。在回晨光之前，你该去见见他。

English: If you’re too busy, I understand. Take care of yourself.
Simplified_Chinese: 如果你太忙，我也理解。多保重。

English: You haven’t left yet?
Simplified_Chinese: 你还没动身吗？

English: Inisis sent you?
Simplified_Chinese: 伊内瑟丝派你来的？

English: Meet with Amadolka
Simplified_Chinese: 与艾玛都卡会面

English: Searching for Clues… 2
Simplified_Chinese: 搜寻线索… 2

English: That sharp woman… How did she know to send you without me saying anything? Do you really need this?
Simplified_Chinese: 那个精明的女人……我什么都没说，她怎么知道派你来？你真的需要这个吗？

English: Sigh… Fine, take it. You can find it right next to me. I tried to analyze that material at Erons Factory, but I couldn’t even figure out what it’s made of.
Simplified_Chinese: 唉……好吧，拿去吧。就在我旁边能找到。我试着在埃隆斯工坊分析过那种材料，可连它的成分都搞不清楚。

English: If you manage to discover anything, let me know. I guess I owe you one now.
Simplified_Chinese: 如果你有什么发现，记得告诉我。算我欠你个人情吧。

English: So I can keep this? Tch… the more I look at it, the more uneasy I feel. Just take it and go.
Simplified_Chinese: 所以这个我能留着？啧……越看越觉得不对劲。你拿上它赶紧走吧。

English: This logbook…!
Simplified_Chinese: 这本航行日志……！

English: Find “Trace of the New Continent”
Simplified_Chinese: 寻找“新大陆的踪迹”

English: The Gear Begins to Turn Again
Simplified_Chinese: 齿轮再度转动

English: So that’s how it was… What on earth happened to the crew of that ship? For now, let me examine this strange material.
Simplified_Chinese: 原来是这样……那艘船的船员到底遭遇了什么？先让我检查一下这种奇怪的材料吧。

English: I can use it to calm the investors. With this logbook, we might even be able to send a follow-up expedition. Hmm… Could you show the logbook and this material to the Strange Collector?
Simplified_Chinese: 我可以用它来安抚投资者。有了这本日志，我们或许还能再派遣一支后续探险队。嗯……你能把航行日志和这种材料带给那位诡异的收藏家看看吗？

English: He should be the first to know. Thank you.
Simplified_Chinese: 他应该是第一个知情的人。谢谢你。

English: Well, if you change your mind, you can come back anytime.
Simplified_Chinese: 好吧，如果你改变主意，随时可以回来。

English: Have you shown it to him yet? Don’t worry, I’m not rushing you.
Simplified_Chinese: 你给他看过了吗？别担心，我不是在催你。

English: Welcome back. How did it go? I knew it—my research wasn’t wrong after all. I truly owe you. It’s not much, but please accept this as my thanks. Things are going to get busy from here on…
Simplified_Chinese: 欢迎回来。情况如何？我就知道——我的研究果然没错。这次真的多亏你了。一点心意不成敬意，请务必收下我的谢礼。接下来恐怕有得忙了……

English: Meet with the Strange Collector
Simplified_Chinese: 与诡异的收藏家会面

English: Chapter 2 Eillun Town
Simplified_Chinese: 第二章 艾尔伦镇

English: Reignited Passion
Simplified_Chinese: 重燃的热情

English: Adventurer, you’ve come at the perfect time. We’re preparing a second expedition based on the logbook you found.
Simplified_Chinese: 冒险者，你来得正是时候。我们正依据你找到的航行日志，筹备第二次探险。

English: This time, we plan to send a scouting party before the main group. Would you be willing to be part of that team?
Simplified_Chinese: 这次我们打算在主力出发前，先派遣一支侦察小队。你愿意加入这支队伍吗？

English: Go see the mayor of Saint City.
Simplified_Chinese: 去见晨光市长

English: I don’t think anyone is better suited for this than you. But there’s still some time before we depart, so you can decide at your own pace.
Simplified_Chinese: 我认为没有比你更合适的人选了。不过离出发还有段时间，你可以按自己的节奏考虑。

English: You know where the mayor is, right?
Simplified_Chinese: 你知道市长在哪儿，对吧？

English: Welcome, adventurer.
Simplified_Chinese: 欢迎，冒险者。

English: Scout Party
Simplified_Chinese: 侦察小队

English: Thanks to what you brought back, I convinced the other investors, and we’ve decided to organize a second expedition. But considering the first expedition vanished and their ship crashed…
Simplified_Chinese: 多亏你带回来的线索，我说服了其他投资者，我们决定组织第二次远征。但考虑到第一支远征队全员失踪、船只坠毁……

English: If we send another group out without understanding what happened, we risk the same disaster. That’s why we plan to send a scouting team first to investigate. Will you take on that role?
Simplified_Chinese: 如果我们不先查明真相就派出第二批人，很可能重蹈覆辙。所以我们打算先派一支侦察队去调查。你愿意承担这个任务吗？

English: After reviewing the logbook, it seems we need to go even farther north, beyond the Gouthan Mountains of Darkon. It looks like there’s some kind of docking point there, so if you arrive safely, you should be able to land.
Simplified_Chinese: 重新审阅航行日志后，我们发现需要前往更北处，越过达肯的山脉。那里似乎存在某种停泊点，如果你们能安全抵达，应该可以着陆。

English: No matter how I look at it, you’re the only one fit for this job. I’ll be waiting for your answer.
Simplified_Chinese: 无论怎么看，你都是唯一能胜任这份工作的人。我会等你的答复。

English: Good luck, adventurer. May your flight be a safe one.
Simplified_Chinese: 祝你好运，冒险者。愿你一路平安。

English: Finally… I’m saved! I survived!
Simplified_Chinese: 终于……我得救了！我活下来了！

English: Meet with [Expedition] Beck
Simplified_Chinese: 与[远征队]贝克会面

English: Straggler
Simplified_Chinese: 掉队者

English: Good to meet you. I’m Beck from Saint City. I… well, I was part of the expedition. Beasts attacked us, and I got separated from the others.
Simplified_Chinese: 幸会。我是来自晨光的贝克。我……呃，我是远征队的成员。我们遭到野兽袭击，我和其他人走散了。

English: Our captain didn’t even check if everyone was on board before taking off. When the attack started, I just happened to be wasting time in the forest. Thanks to that, I survived.
Simplified_Chinese: 我们船长甚至没清点人数就紧急起飞了。袭击发生时，我正好在森林里消磨时间。多亏这样，我才活了下来。

English: A second expedition? That’s a relief. I’ll join them and go home as soon as they arrive. But… could I ask you for a favor?
Simplified_Chinese: 第二次远征？那就好。等他们到了，我就跟队回家。不过……我能拜托你帮个忙吗？

English: I lost my serial number chain while fleeing from those beasts. I searched where I dropped it, but it was gone. It might still be somewhere nearby. Could you go and look for it? Please, I’m counting on you.
Simplified_Chinese: 我在躲避那些野兽时，把编号链弄丢了。我回去找过，但已经不见了。它可能还在附近什么地方。你能去找找看吗？全靠你了。

English: If you change your mind, please come back.
Simplified_Chinese: 如果你改变主意，请一定回来。

English: Those creatures went that way!
Simplified_Chinese: 那些家伙往那边去了！

English: I can’t thank you enough for your help. While you were gone, some beastmen—different from the ones that attacked me—showed up. They gave me food and pointed out a place before leaving. Eat something, then head over there.
Simplified_Chinese: 真不知该怎么感谢你才好。你不在的时候，来了一群兽人——和袭击我的那些不一样。他们给了我食物，指了个地方就离开了。吃点东西，然后去那边看看吧。

English: Gather 10 Abandoned Serial Number Chains
Simplified_Chinese: 收集10条废弃编号链

English: Proficiency Test
Simplified_Chinese: 能力测试

English: Oy! Halt! Who are you? …That’s quite a story. Suspicious. Are you a Lycan spy? If not, prove it.
Simplified_Chinese: 喂！站住！你是什么人？……这故事可真够离奇的。很可疑啊。你是狼人派来的探子吗？如果不是，就证明给我看。

English: Defeat 20 Hundur Sharpfoots, and then I’ll believe you.
Simplified_Chinese: 干掉20个疾行猎犬，我就相信你。

English: Hmph! I knew it. You must be a spy!
Simplified_Chinese: 哼！我早料到了。你肯定是探子！

English: What? You can’t even handle that? Pathetic. There’s no way I can let you into the village like this.
Simplified_Chinese: 什么？连这都办不到？真可悲。我绝不可能放你这样进村。

English: (Hmm… seems stronger than me…)
Simplified_Chinese: （嗯……看起来比我强啊……）

English: Kill 20 Hundur Sharpfoots
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀20只疾行猎犬

English: Territorial Cats
Simplified_Chinese: 领地之争

English: That’s still not enough to convince me. I don’t even know who you really are. If you want to live alongside our village, you’ll need to prove yourself with your strength. Then at least we can rely on each other.
Simplified_Chinese: 这还不足以让我信服。我连你的真实身份都不知道。如果你想和我们的村子共存，就得用实力证明自己。这样至少我们能相互依靠。

English: If you’re serious about proving yourself, defeat Captain Hundur Sharpfoot and bring me proof.
Simplified_Chinese: 如果你真心想证明自己，就去击败大型疾行猎犬，把证据带给我。

English: At your current level, it might be difficult. I understand.
Simplified_Chinese: 以你目前的实力，这可能有些困难。我明白。

English: Still not done? When exactly do you plan to enter the village?
Simplified_Chinese: 还没完成？你到底打算什么时候进村？

English: (Seriously…?) You’re struggling with just those? Hah… well, I guess you tried. Go on, someone will guide you inside.
Simplified_Chinese: （认真的吗……？）就这点对手都应付不来？哈……算了，至少你试过了。进去吧，里面会有人接应你。

English: Kill 11 Captain Hundur Sharpfoots and bring 1 Piece of Hundur Bone
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 11 只大型疾行猎犬，并带回1块猎犬族骨片

English: New Town Life?
Simplified_Chinese: 新城镇生活？

English: Welcome, stranger. You’re now in Eillun Town, the refuge of the Myurangs. Wait, you defeated Captain Hundur Sharpfoot? Ah, so you fell for his trick. I only sent him out for training because he’s always slacking off.
Simplified_Chinese: 欢迎，陌生人。你现在身处艾尔伦镇，穆兰族的避难所。等等，你击败了大型疾行猎犬？啊，看来你中了他的计。我就是看他总偷懒，才打发他出去历练的。

English: Don’t worry, I’ll give him a much harsher assignment next time. To stay in this village, you’ll need the captain’s approval. He’s strict, so expect more tests.
Simplified_Chinese: 别担心，下次我会给他派个更苦的差事。想留在村里，你得得到队长的许可。他很严格，做好接受更多考验的准备吧。

English: You can find him over there. Go talk to him yourself.
Simplified_Chinese: 他在那边，你自己过去找他谈吧。

English: What will he ask you to do? No idea.
Simplified_Chinese: 他会让你做什么？我也不知道。

English: Just know that without his approval, you won’t be able to do much in this village.
Simplified_Chinese: 你只需要知道，没有他的许可，你在这个村子里可办不成什么事。

English: Who are you?
Simplified_Chinese: 你哪位？

English: Meet with [Captain] Baron
Simplified_Chinese: 与[队长] 巴伦会面

English: Captain’s Test 1
Simplified_Chinese: 队长测试 1

English: A hairless outsider in our village… What were the guards doing? So, you want to stay here? We’re at war with the Lycans. For all I know, you might be one of their spies. I can’t allow you to stay without proof.
Simplified_Chinese: 一个没长毛的外人闯进我们村子……卫兵都在干什么？所以，你想留在这儿？我们正和狼人开战。在我看来，你完全可能是他们派来的探子。没有证据，我不能允许你留下。

English: Kill 25 Small Samosets. That’ll at least get us talking.
Simplified_Chinese: 去杀掉25只小型萨莫塞特。这样我们至少还能谈下去。

English: If you can’t handle something that simple, I can’t let you in.
Simplified_Chinese: 如果连这种简单的事都办不到，我决不能让你进来。

English: If you finish quickly, you’ll be able to use the village facilities sooner.
Simplified_Chinese: 要是你动作够快，就能早点使用村里的设施。

English: Already done? Alright. I can say you’re not one of those dog spies.
Simplified_Chinese: 已经完成了？行。我能确定你不是那些狗探子一伙的了。

English: Kill 25 Small Samosets
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 25 只小型萨莫塞特

English: Captain’s Test 2
Simplified_Chinese: 队长测试 2

Simplified_Chinese: 你来得太及时了。要是没有你，村子恐怕就危险了。

Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 20 只大型绯云术士

English: Reunion 1
Simplified_Chinese: 重逢 1

Simplified_Chinese: 等局势稳定下来，我们打算组织反击。你愿意再次助我们一臂之力吗？对了，之前有些村民一直在找你，想亲自向你道谢。

Simplified_Chinese: 要不你先去找一下[艾尔伦士兵] 加德？听说你帮了他不少忙——而且他好像正为你准备了什么重要的东西。

English: You’ve done more than enough, so don’t feel pressured.
Simplified_Chinese: 你已经做得够多了，千万别觉得有压力。

Simplified_Chinese: 你真的辛苦了。每一场战斗都不轻松，但我相信你一定还能再带给我们胜利。东西不多，一点心意，请务必收下。

Simplified_Chinese: 跟[艾尔伦士兵] 加德见面还愉快吗？不知道接下来又是哪位在等着你呢。

English: This time it’s Kaela. I don’t know exactly what she’s planning, but I’d say you’re in for something interesting.
Simplified_Chinese: 这次是凯拉。我也不清楚她具体在筹划什么，但估计你要有好戏看了。

English: No need to rush—take your time.
Simplified_Chinese: 不用着急，慢慢来就好。

English: Have you met her yet? Honestly, I have no idea what she’s up to.
Simplified_Chinese: 你见着她了吗？老实说，我也完全猜不透她在打什么主意。

Simplified_Chinese: 唉，我已经不再给爸妈添麻烦了，别再用那种眼神看我行不行。

Simplified_Chinese: 希望你和凯拉相处得挺开心。你觉得下一个会是谁在等你？

English: Now it’s Livia’s turn. I’m not sure what she has planned either, but I’m sure it’ll be something special.
Simplified_Chinese: 这回轮到[宠物驯练师] 丽薇雅了。我也不确定她有什么安排，但肯定不会普通。

Simplified_Chinese: 不急，你准备好了再去就行。

English: Have you met her yet? I really have no idea what’s coming next.

Simplified_Chinese: 结果最后那件事居然完全走了样……不管怎么说，虽然我们并非同类，但我只能想象你为我们承受了多少。这只是我们的一点心意，请务必收下。

English: Meet with Livia
Simplified_Chinese: 与[宠物驯练师] 丽薇雅会面

English: Reunion 4

Simplified_Chinese: 好了，我想这应该是最后一位来找你的人了。猜猜看是谁？

English: Taila is next. Whatever happens, I have a feeling it will be something meaningful.
Simplified_Chinese: 接下来是泰拉。不管发生什么，我有种预感，这一定会很有意义。

English: Don’t feel pressured. Go at your own pace.
Simplified_Chinese: 别有压力，按你自己的节奏来就好。

English: Did you meet her? I still don’t know what she’s planning.
Simplified_Chinese: 你见着她了吗？我还是搞不清楚她在盘算什么。

English: Thanks to you, adventurer, I found my parents’ hidden will. My father exposed the jarl’s crimes, and my grandfather had him killed. Branded a traitor, he was nearly murdered. Please avenge them. Take this, and let it fuel your revenge.
Simplified_Chinese: 多亏了你，冒险者，我才找到了父母留下的那份隐秘遗嘱。我父亲揭露了族长的罪行，而我祖父因此派人杀了他。他被扣上叛徒的罪名，差点就被害死了。请你替他们报仇。拿着这个，让它成为你复仇的动力吧。

English: Meet with Taila
Simplified_Chinese: 与泰拉会面

Simplified_Chinese: 第五章 最终章

Simplified_Chinese: 这么说，你已经见过所有人了？狼人的动作比我们预想的快。我还以为他们需要更多时间来重整旗鼓，结果他们已经在集结兵力了。

English: If we let them gather any more, things will become much harder. Could you go ahead and disrupt their plans?
Simplified_Chinese: 如果我们任由他们继续集结，局面只会更难收拾。你能不能先去打乱他们的部署？

English: Thank you. I couldn’t ask for a more reliable ally.
Simplified_Chinese: 谢谢。我实在找不到比你更可靠的盟友了。

English: If we hesitate, everything we’ve built could collapse. I’m counting on you.
Simplified_Chinese: 稍有迟疑，我们辛辛苦苦建立的一切都可能毁于一旦。我就指望你了。

English: Here’s where we expect them to be.
Simplified_Chinese: 这就是我们预计他们会现身的地方。

English: You’ve done wonderfully.
Simplified_Chinese: 你表现得非常出色。

Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 30 只小型泰亚哈战士

Simplified_Chinese: 迈向最终决战

Simplified_Chinese: 剩下的交给我们来处理吧。

Simplified_Chinese: [长者] 艾尔正在找你，情况紧急，你最好过去一趟。

English: We can clean up what’s left on our own.
Simplified_Chinese: 剩下的残局我们自己能收拾干净。

Simplified_Chinese: 我没听清全部细节，但听起来挺重要的。

Simplified_Chinese: 与[长者] 艾尔会面

Simplified_Chinese: 破招

Simplified_Chinese: 我从巴伦队长那儿听说，你的伏击很成功。多亏了你，敌人现在乱成一团。我们不能浪费这个机会，准备发动一次佯攻。趁这段时间，你能去处理泰阿哈那边的事吗？

English: That’s reassuring.
Simplified_Chinese: 那就好，听着就让人放心不少。

English: Hmm. Do you have a different suggestion?
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯，你是有别的想法吗？

Simplified_Chinese: 好，那我就等着你的下一个捷报了。

English: Excellent work.
Simplified_Chinese: 干得漂亮。

English: Kill 30 Taiahas
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 30 只泰亚哈战士

Simplified_Chinese: 叛徒

Simplified_Chinese: 我们的行动也很成功，但是……有些士兵说在敌营里看见了族长，他是跟着敌军一起撤退的。现在军心有点动摇。

English: I knew he was scheming, but to see him betray his own people… This will be our next move.
Simplified_Chinese: 我知道他一直在搞鬼，但亲眼看到他背叛自己的族人……这将是我们要应对的下一场战斗。

Simplified_Chinese: 只要那个叛徒还逍遥法外，士兵们就不可能全力作战。你必须把他追回来。他的逃亡路线上会有狼人埋伏，包括大型泰亚哈战士，不过我相信难不倒你。

English: Hmm… I may have to send the soldiers instead. If you change your mind, come back.
Simplified_Chinese: 嗯……看来我可能得改派士兵去了。如果你改变主意，随时回来找我。

Simplified_Chinese: 我就指望你了。这项任务我信得过你。

Simplified_Chinese: 感谢您的付出，长官。我是[艾尔伦侦察兵] 默克，奉长老之命前来追踪那个叛徒。

Simplified_Chinese: 与[艾尔伦侦察兵] 默克

Simplified_Chinese: 坏消息

English: The fact that the traitor went this far suggests they’re more closely allied than we thought. In any case, we’ll have to defeat this enemy to uncover any proof.
Simplified_Chinese: 叛徒竟然逃到这么远的地方，说明他们之间的勾结比我们想象的还要深。无论如何，我们必须击败这个敌人才能找到证据。

English: Thank you. Once you secure evidence, I think you should return to the Elder.
Simplified_Chinese: 谢谢。等你拿到证据，我觉得你应该立刻回长老那里复命。

Simplified_Chinese: 这是我目前能想到的最优方案了。你有更好的主意吗？

English: I’ll be waiting.
Simplified_Chinese: 我会在这里等你的消息。

Simplified_Chinese: 除了那个族长之外，这场战争终于结束了。随着那个恶心的巨人被打败，战事算是彻底画上句号了。拖得太久了。谢谢你为这场战争画上了句号。

English: Kill 1 Chief Keokuk and obtain “Chief Keokuk’s Notebook”
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 1 酋长基奥卡克然后获得《酋长基奥克的笔记》

English: The Ever-Turning Vicious Cycle of Blood
Simplified_Chinese: 永不停歇的血腥轮回

Simplified_Chinese: 狼人把恶魔安库当成神明来崇拜。那个叛徒一定和它做了交易，出卖我们才让这场战争一直打下去。要完全召唤出恶魔，需要巨量的鲜血作为祭品。

English: According to the note you brought, they’ve already attempted the summoning, but it’s incomplete. Their final goal must be to complete that abomination.
Simplified_Chinese: 根据你带回来的笔记看，他们已经尝试过召唤，但还没完成。他们的最终目标一定是把这个怪物彻底召唤出来。

Simplified_Chinese: 大陆边缘就是安库的封印庇护所。如果叛徒躲在那里，是杀了他还是把他带回来，由你来决定。拜托了，结束这场疯狂吧。

Simplified_Chinese: 你是穆兰的英雄，这件事必须由你来终结。如果任由它发展下去，整片大陆都会被鲜血淹没。

Simplified_Chinese: 你已经付出了很多，但如果可以的话，我还想再拜托你一件事。

English: I pray this ends without more tragedy.

English: So… you’ve come all the way here.
Simplified_Chinese: 看来……你还是一路追到了这里。

Simplified_Chinese: 高潮

English: Go on. Ankou will give you peace. My granddaughter wanted revenge? Ha. I lost my wife long ago and never had a child—how could I have a granddaughter? Kuhuhu… so even you… (dies)
Simplified_Chinese: 继续吧。安库会赐予你安宁的。我孙女想要复仇？哈。我早就没了妻子，也没生过孩子——哪来的孙女？库呼呼……原来连你也是……（断气）

English: What’s wrong? Are you afraid now that you have to face a demon? It’s too late for that.
Simplified_Chinese: 怎么了？现在要面对恶魔了，害怕了吗？可惜已经太迟了。

English: (He’s dead.)
Simplified_Chinese: （他已经断气了。）

English: What happened? Is Ankou defeated? The handwriting on this page… so the traitor is gone as well.
Simplified_Chinese: 发生了什么？安库被打败了吗？这一页上的字迹……看来那个叛徒也已经不在了。

Simplified_Chinese: 击败安库并获取「族长的日记」

English: Peace at Last?
Simplified_Chinese: 终于和平了？

Simplified_Chinese: 难以置信。虽然不算完全体召唤，但你还是把它打败了。族长还有家人？他早在很久以前就失去了妻子，而且根本没有子嗣。

English: Whatever the truth, you’ve saved this land from the demon and those filthy beasts. You have my deepest thanks. Trade with your continent? Of course. I fully support it. I’ll guarantee free passage for anyone coming to our village. Take this approval token.
Simplified_Chinese: 不管真相如何，你把这个地方从恶魔和那些肮脏的野兽手里救了出来。我由衷地感谢你。和你们大陆通商？当然没问题，我全力支持。我会保证所有前往我们村庄的人都能自由通行。拿着这块通行令吧。

English: I’m looking forward to it. I wonder what kind of heroes will come next.
Simplified_Chinese: 我很期待。不知道接下来会来什么样的英雄呢。

English: Still, some formalities must be followed, don’t you think?
Simplified_Chinese: 不过，总还是要走个过场，你说是吧？

English: Haha. You’re free to use the village facilities whenever you like.
Simplified_Chinese: 哈哈，以后随时欢迎你来村里随便用各种设施。

English: It’s been a while. How goes your exploration of the New Continent? You’ve really been through a lot. You didn’t just chart new lands—you saved an entire town and secured official permission for trade. I’ll see that you’re properly rewarded. Well done.
Simplified_Chinese: 好久不见。新大陆的探索进展如何？你这一路真是历经艰险。你不仅绘制了新地图，还拯救了一整个城镇，还拿到了正式的通商许可。我会确保你得到应有的奖赏。干得漂亮。

English: New Beginning
Simplified_Chinese: 新的开始

English: So, how was the New Continent? And this… what is it? Hmm… a document I’ve never seen before. This alone isn’t enough to understand it. Could you find more of these?
Simplified_Chinese: 那么，新大陆怎么样？还有这个……这是什么？嗯……我从没见过的文书。光凭这个还看不出所以然。你能不能再找一些类似的东西来？

English: From the look of it, I’d say there are at least three more. We’ll need all of them to figure it out.
Simplified_Chinese: 看样子，至少还有三份。要把事情弄清楚，我们得把它们全部集齐。

English: Sigh… I suppose there’s no other choice.
Simplified_Chinese: 唉……看来也只能这样了。

English: He should still be there.
Simplified_Chinese: 他应该还在那儿。

Obtain 4 different “Torn Scrolls”
Simplified_Chinese: 收集4份不同的「残破卷轴」

English: Lost in the Fog
Simplified_Chinese: 迷雾之中

Simplified_Chinese: 本来以为我能破译，但里面混入了不少未知的文字。我听说有个家伙或许能看懂这种东西，你愿意去找找他吗？

English: There’s a large island near Flarine. He should be somewhere around there.
Simplified_Chinese: 帕里镇附近有一座大岛，他应该就在那一带。

English: Unfortunately, I can’t think of any better option.
Simplified_Chinese: 可惜，我也想不出更好的办法了。

English: I don’t know the exact location myself—just what I’ve heard.
Simplified_Chinese: 我自己也不清楚确切位置，只是听人说起过。

English: It’s been a while. What brings you here? You found this in Kaillun? I’m Muran as well, though I left my tribe long ago. I can’t say much, but will you hand that over? It’s about summoning a god and speeding up the tower’s completion. Take this as thanks.
Simplified_Chinese: 好久不见，你怎么来了？这是在凯伦找到的？我也来自穆兰，虽然很早就离开了部族。我不能多说，把这东西交给我吧。这关乎神的召唤和塔的加速完工，拿好这个当作谢礼。

English: Meet with “[Mysterious] ???”
Simplified_Chinese: 与[未知] ??? 会面

English: Kaillun Daily Quests
Simplified_Chinese: 凯伦 每日任务

English: Lost your chain again?
Simplified_Chinese: 又“掉链子”了？

English: Could you help me, sir? That thing stole my belongings again. I’ll be punished if I don’t get my serial number chain back. Please help me.
Simplified_Chinese: 先生，能帮帮我吗？那东西又把我的物品偷走了。要是拿不回我的编号链，我会被惩罚的。求求你帮帮我。

English: Oh gods, thank you.
Simplified_Chinese: 噢，我的老天鹅，谢谢你。

English: Think of it as helping the dead, just this once… Please, I beg you.
Simplified_Chinese: 就当是帮帮亡者一次……求你了。

English: Have you retrieved it yet? Ah, not yet, I see.
Simplified_Chinese: 找到了吗？啊，看来还没有。

English: I can’t thank you enough.
Simplified_Chinese: 真不知道该怎么谢你才好。

English: Kill 50 Small Hundur Sharpfoots and obtain 1 Abandoned Serial Number Chain
Simplified_Chinese: 击杀 50 只小型疾行猎犬然后获得1条废弃编号链

English: Clearing the Area
Simplified_Chinese: 清剿区域

English: There are so many Captain Kyouchish around that I can’t rest in peace. Could you take care of them?
